name: property managers handling 5–15 inspections/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 inspections/month, inefficient reporting causes compliance delays. We simplify inspections and generate reports instead of manual inspection processes and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Managing recurring property inspections and compliance reporting is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Managing recurring property inspections and compliance reporting is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 inspections/month, inefficient reporting causes compliance delays. We simplify inspections and generate reports instead of manual inspection processes and spreadsheets.
